strings.order_id_prompt: What's your order number? (Format: ORD-XXXXX) Or I can look it up by email.
strings.email_prompt: What email address did you use for the order?
strings.order_not_found: I couldn't find an order with that information. Please double-check and try again, or I can look it up by email address.
strings.delivery_updated: Your delivery preference has been updated.
strings.reorder_confirmation: I've added the items from your previous order to your cart.
strings.invalid_order_format: Please provide a valid order number (format: ORD-XXXXX) or an email address.
strings.max_lookup_attempts: I've been unable to find your order after several attempts. Let me connect you with a specialist who can help.
